name: Settlement Lobster Bisque
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cold water or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the meat from the lobster shell and dice the body meat.
2. Chop the claw and tail meat fine.
3. Add the water or broth to the body bones and tough ends of the claws (cut into pieces) in a pot. Bring slowly to boiling point and cook for 20 minutes.
4. Drain, reserving the liquid.
5. Heat the butter, add the flour and seasoning, then gradually incorporate the liquid.
6. Scald the milk and stir it in gradually.
7. Add the lobster meat and cook slowly for 5 minutes.
8. Add the cream and serve at once.
